description: Defines a Java entity class 'User' mapping to a 'users' table, representing user data with fields like email, password hash, email verification status, and creation timestamp.

classes.name: User
classes.description: Entity class representing a user with fields for id, email, passwordHash, emailVerified, and createdAt.

methods.name: User(String email, String passwordHash)
methods.description: Constructor initializing User with email and password hash; sets emailVerified to false and createdAt to current time.

methods.name: getId()
methods.description: Returns the unique identifier of the user.

methods.name: getEmail()
methods.description: Returns the email address of the user.

methods.name: setEmail(String email)
methods.description: Sets the email address of the user.

methods.name: isEmailVerified()
methods.description: Returns whether the email is verified.

search-terms: User class with email and password
